    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    CustomizationController
    Controller for the drink customization screen.
    DatabaseConnection
    Provides a JDBC connection to the PostgreSQL database.
    Employee
    Represents an employee with an ID, name, role, and hashed PIN.
    EmployeeListController
    Controller for the employee list view.
    HelloApplication
    JavaFX application entry point that loads the login view.
    HelloController
     
    InventoryDAO
    Data access object for inventory items.
    InventoryViewController
    Controller for the inventory management view.
    LoginController
    Controller class for the Login screen.
    MenuEditController
    Controller for the Menu Edit view (Manager Only).
    OrderController
    Controller class for the Order processing screen.
    ReportsController
    Controller class for the Reports dashboard.
    RunMigration
    One-time database migration helper.
    SceneConfig
    Configuration class that stores application scene dimensions and utility methods related to scene management.
    UserSession
    Manages the current authenticated user session.
